extract: Salamence (Japanese: ボーマンダ Bohmander) is a dual-type Dragon/Flying Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It evolves from Shelgon starting at level 50. It is the final form of Bagon. Salamence can Mega Evolve into Mega Salamence using the Salamencite. Mega Salamence was introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. It is referred to as a pseudo-legendary Pokémon by fans. The Paradox Pokémon Roaring Moon is said to be an ancient relative of Mega Salamence or a version of it from a parallel timeline.
